description: Rollback files to their state at the beginning of the current turn. Each file is reverted to the version saved when first modified in this turn. Directory paths restore ALL files under that directory that have snapshots. Omit paths to restore ALL files modified in the current turn. Files with no snapshot are silently skipped.
name: rollback

paths.description: Optional. File or directory paths to rollback. Omit to rollback ALL files modified in the current turn.
